name: Send prep email to client
notes:
Dear

We are preparing to begin with the installation of your equipment. Once we have completed the physical installation, we will be programming and configuring it to suit your preferences.

The configuring takes some time. And there's a period of snagging and fine tuning, to get the electronics fully settled in the building. Sometimes things might not work as expected during this time. Please just drop us an email so that we can add it to the snag list.

We prepare as much as possible, to fast-track this process. 

We'll do our best to iron out all of the kinks as quickly as possible.

Thanks for your patience during this time. We're really looking forward to handing over your completed smart system.

Best Regards

D-One.

name: Wi-Fi dropping in some areas as per Simon-Ovrc showing some offline devices
Video permissions
notes:
Of course! Here’s a more personal and concise version:

---

**Subject: Can We Share Your Amazing Project?**

Hi [Client's Name],

I hope you're doing well! We're so proud of the home automation project we completed together and how it transformed your space.

We'd love to shoot a short video at your home to show future clients what we can do. We promise to be respectful and keep it quick and unobtrusive. Your home is amazing, and seeing it in action would really help others understand our work.

If you’re comfortable, a short testimonial about your experience would also be incredibly appreciated.

Thank you so much for considering this. Your support means the world to us!

Best,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Home Automation Company]  
[Contact Information]

---
